message:
Merge PR #2763: fix(daemon): skip CRASHED_POLECAT alerts for closed hook beads

Skip crash detection for polecats whose hook_bead is already closed (work
completed normally), preventing false-positive alert spam.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2763
Author: KingMob

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
